message:
feat(tests): add T8.11 cross-track unit-test quality threshold enforcement (32 tests)

Extends tokio_unit_quality_threshold_contract.rs with enforcement tests
that validate per-track test files meet contracted minimums: TQ-01
(>= 20 tests/track), TQ-03 (>= 4 cancel/leak tests), UQ-01 (five
category coverage), UQ-03 (cancellation content), UQ-04 (leak-oracle
content), and supplementary file existence. (asupersync-2oh2u.10.11)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
